name: Walnut Cake with Coffee Cream
recipeIngredient: 50 milliliters (2 fluid ounces) Madeira or Port
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 170°C/325°F/Gas Mark 3.
2. Grease and flour a round cake tin. Chop half of the walnuts and grind the remainder. Mix with the sugar.
3. Whisk the egg whites until they form stiff peaks, then fold into the nut and sugar mixture.
4. Turn the batter into the prepared tin and bake for 15-20 minutes. Turn the cake onto a rack and allow to cool.
5. To make the coffee cream, whisk the egg yolks and sugar in a heatproof bowl until light and creamy. Add the coffee and place the bowl over a pan of hot water. Beat the mixture until it has thickened. Beat in the chocolate, Madeira or port, stirring occasionally.
6. Whip the cream and mix it into the cold coffee mixture.
7. Spread the cream over the cake. Put the cake in the freezer for 2 hours.
8. Take the cake out of the freezer shortly before serving and garnish with walnut halves and crystallized flowers (e.g., Lilac, violets, or mimosas).
